channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Zawadi Yamungu's Sama and Basadi Nominations Highlight Indigenous Music's Place in Mainstream
item.description: Zawadi Yamungu, a South African singer, has received her first Sama nomination for Best African Adult Contemporary Album and three Basadi in Music Awards nominations, including Songwriter of the Year....

item.title: USD to Naira Black Market Rate Today: July 15th, 2026
item.description: The article details the current dollar-to-naira exchange rate in the black market (parallel market) as of July 15th, 2026. According to sources at Bureau De Change (BDC), Lagos Parallel Market players...

item.title: Alphamin Resources Reports Record Tin Production and Sales in DRC
item.description: Alphamin Resources, a Canada-JSE-listed company operating in the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC), has reported significant growth in tin production and sales for the second quarter. The company ach...

item.title: Kenya to Host iGaming AFRIKA Summit 2027 with Global Participation
item.description: The iGaming AFRIKA (iGA) Summit is set to return to Nairobi's Sarit Expo Centre in May 2027, building on the success of its 2026 edition. The inaugural summit attracted over 3,300 delegates from more ...

item.title: Cuba Faces Ongoing Power Crisis Amid Fuel Shortages and U.S. Embargo
item.description: Cuba is experiencing its third nationwide blackout in two weeks, exacerbating an ongoing energy crisis fueled by a U.S. oil embargo and dwindling fuel reserves. The blackout, caused by a generating un...

item.title: Senate impeachment trial of VP Duterte focuses on tax and bank records
item.description: The Senate impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte resumed on July 15, 2026, with no witnesses scheduled to testify. Both the prosecution and defense teams shifted their focus to a critical l...

item.title: Snowbirds Conclude Final Season with Special Stop in Saskatoon
item.description: The Royal Canadian Air Force's Snowbirds aerobatic team, set to retire their classic Tutor jets at the end of their final season, made an unexpected stop in Saskatoon on July 14, 2026. The visit, orga...

item.title: India's Citizenship Crisis: The Struggle for Proof of Identity
item.description: The article highlights India's citizenship crisis, where citizens face challenges in proving their identity due to the absence of a legal document that conclusively establishes citizenship. The Minist...

item.title: Akpabio Proposes Electoral Act Review Amid Lawmakers' Primary Setbacks
item.description: President of the Senate, Godswill Akpabio, has indicated that the National Assembly may amend aspects of the Electoral Act 2026 following recent political developments that exposed unintended conseque...

item.title: Tanzania's economic strategy focuses on domestic savings and investment
item.description: Tanzania is prioritizing domestic capital formation over foreign investment to achieve economic self-reliance. The article argues that true prosperity comes from citizen-driven savings and productive ...

item.title: Kerry's tactical mastery edges out Dublin in high-stakes Gaelic Games clash
item.description: The Gaelic Games semi-final showdown between Dublin and Kerry showcased a masterclass in strategic adaptability and player intelligence. While Dublin executed a solid gameplan, Kerry's superior tactic...

item.title: Amando Virgil Ligutan: Lawyer and Key Figure in Sara Duterte's Impeachment Trial
item.description: Amando Virgil Ligutan, a Cebuano lawyer and member of the House prosecutors in Vice President Sara Duterte's impeachment trial, has become a focal point due to his sharp legal arguments and cultural i...

item.title: Alberta's FASD Support Program for Inmates Shows Promising Results in Reducing Recidivism
item.description: The article highlights Alberta's Transitional Mentorship program, which supports inmates with Fetal Alcohol Spectrum Disorder (FASD) in reintegrating into society. Katlin Sharko, a 40-year-old inmate,...

item.title: Mark Carney's Negotiations on the Gordie Howe Bridge and Trump's Influence
item.description: The article critiques Prime Minister Mark Carney's decision to concede to Donald Trump's demands regarding the Gordie Howe Bridge deal. Originally, Canada funded the bridge and collected toll revenues...

item.title: Tshwane City Manager Challenges Suspension in Urgent Legal Action
item.description: Johann Mettler, the city manager of Tshwane, has initiated an urgent legal challenge at the Pretoria High Court to overturn his precautionary suspension by the municipal council. The application seeks...

item.title: Lai Mohammed hails Buhari's unwavering commitment to Nigeria's unity
item.description: Alhaji Lai Mohammed, a former Minister of Information and Culture, paid tribute to late President Muhammadu Buhari, highlighting his integrity, patriotism, and dedication to Nigeria's unity. Speaking ...

item.title: Madhya Pradesh's UCC Draft Aims to Streamline Property Registration Process
item.description: The article discusses the proposed Uniform Civil Code (UCC) draft by the Madhya Pradesh High Court, which seeks to standardize property registration processes across different jurisdictions. The initi...

item.title: Australian woman faces legal action over alleged extremist indoctrination of children
item.description: Rayann El Houli, a 34-year-old woman from Victoria, is facing charges in Melbourne Magistrates’ Court after allegedly attempting to radicalise her young children with Islamic State (ISIS) propaganda w...

item.title: Political analysts express shock over lack of public awareness about recent ICE killings
item.description: Political analysts have expressed surprise that many swing voters remain unaware of recent Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) shootings in Texas and Maine. During an episode of The Next Level, ...

item.title: Google Images Introduces Personalized Image Discovery and AI Image Creation Features
item.description: Google is overhauling its Images service with a Pinterest-inspired redesign aimed at transforming image search into a personalized discovery experience. The update includes 'For You' galleries that ad...
